posts.author: bryce-thewell (Bryce K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’m creating a widget board that displays up to 30 different calculated numbers. I wanted to add a new widget somewhere in the middle, but now I have to reorient every widget individually. Could there be a way to select multiple widgets at once and move them around?

What are you trying to achieve

Move multiple widgets simultaneously.
